title: Spicyee's BetterBuild
description: A mod that adds many new and much needed building blocks/utilities
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/554b4077a18d67daa7aba6f3007b905ec29dd00b.png)
-----
Betterbuild is a mod designed to add to the building scene in Minecraft in a Vanilla+ style, primarily by adding new blocks. Ever wanted Dripstone Bricks, or Stone Pillars? Then we have what you're looking for.


## Features

### Building Blocks

- Stone, Deepslate, and Blackstone
  - Pilar Blocks
- Granite, Diorite, and Andesite
  - Polished Walls
  - Brick Blocks
    - Stairs, Slabs, and Walls 
    - Cracked Bricks
  - Pillar Blocks
- Dripstone, Calcite, and Tuff
  - Stairs, Slabs. and Walls
  - Polished Blocks
    - Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
  - Brick Blocks
    - Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
    - Cracked Bricks
  - Chiseled Blocks
  - Pillar Blocks
- Brick Variants
  - Cracked Bricks
  - Mixed and Aged Bricks (+ Cracked Block Variants)
    - Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Sandstone and Red Sandstone
  - Polished Walls
  - Brick Blocks
    - Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
  - Pillar Blocks
- Red Nether Brick
  - Cracked and Chiseled Variants
  - Fence
- Blue and Black Nether Brick
  - Block, Stairs, Slabs, Walls, and Fences
  - Cracked and Chiseled Variants
- Charcoal Block
- Iron and Gold
  - Cut Variants
- Black Quartz
  - Block, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
  - Chiseled, Pillar, Brick, and Smooth Blocks (+ Smooth Stairs & Slabs)

### Colored Blocks

- Stained Wood Planks (All Dye Colors)
  - Blocks, Stairs, Slabs, Fences, and Fence Gates
- Stained Bricks (All Dye Colors)
  - Blocks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls
- Concrete
  - Stair, Slab, and Wall variants

-----

## Planned Additions

### Building Blocks

- Dripstone, Calcite, Tuff, Granite, Diorite, and Andesite
  - Tile Variants (+ Cracked Tiles)
  - Buttons
  - Pressure Plates
- Bassalt and Endstone
  - Polished Variants
  - Brick Variants (+ Cracked Bricks)
  - Tile Variants (+ Cracked Tiles)
  - Chiseled and Pillar Variants
- Ice and Snow
  - Brick Variants (+ Cracked Bricks)
  - Tile Variants (+ Cracked Tiles)
  - Chiseled and Pillar Variants
- Other
  - Inflammable Plank Variant (All Wood)
  - Tile and Cracked Tile Block Variants (Most Stones)
  - Mossy Brick and Tile Variants (All Bricks and Tiles)
  - Warped/Crimson Brick and Tile Variants (All Bricks and Tiles)
  - Hedges
  - Gates (For All Wall Types)
  - Packed Bricks (Big Bricks)
  - Posts (For All Stripped Woods)

### Colored Blocks

- Stained Wood
  - Doors
  - Trapdoors
  - Pressure Plates
  - Buttons
  - Signs
  - Hanging Signs
  - Boats
  - Chest Boats
- Concrete
  - Chiseled Variant
- Terracotta
  - Shingles
  - Bricks
  - Tiles
- Crystal Lanterns (Each with a unique pattern)
- Glow Lanterns (Sea-Lantern styled Glowstone light)
- Stained Glowstone and Stained Glowstone Lamps

### Retextures
- Terracotta Shingles

## Possible Planned Additions
_Stuff that may or may not make it in_

- Rubber
- Asphalt
- New dyes, plus variants for all dyed blocks and sheep
  - Maroon
  - Canary
  - Mint
  - Lavender
  - Navy
  - Indigo
  - Lavender
  - Coral
